subcodes.first_line: O sincere servant of the Abhá Beauty! Render thanks unto God that, in the path of that incomparable and compassionate Beloved, thou hast endured evident tribulations
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال ابهی شکر کن خدا را که در ره آن یکتا دلبر مهربان صدمات
subcodes.subjects: @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @suffering and imprisonment
